# Cotton Box

> Minimal state management library for React and beyond.

This file contains links to documentation sections following the llmstxt.org standard.

## Table of Contents

- [V1.X.X](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/changelogs/v1.x.x.md)
- [V2.X.X](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/changelogs/current.md)
- [Tic Tac Toe](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/demo/advanced/tic-tac-toe.md): This is a game of tic-tac-toe that uses a class to manage the game logic instead of writing it all with React Hooks.
- [Video Camera](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/demo/advanced/video-camera.md): This is an adapted implementation of [`VideoCamera`](https://github.com/glyph-cat/swiss-army-knife/blob/main/src/packages/core/src/media/video-came...
- [Counter](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/demo/basic/counter.md): In this example, a counter value is stored in a state manager.
- [Notes App](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/demo/basic/notes-app.md): This is an example of a simple notes app that uses the spread operator (`...`) to set state.
- [Todo List App](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/demo/basic/todo-list-app.md): This is an example of a to-do list app that uses [Immer](https://immerjs.github.io/immer/) for immutability.
- [Stress Test](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/demo/miscellaneous/stress-test.md): The sandboxes below show how many operations per second each library is capable of.

- [Opt Out of Re-renders Due To State Change](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/learn/react/opt-out-of-rerenders.md): Sometimes, we might want to temporarily unsubscribe from state changes in a component. This can be done by passing a third parameter. If a selector...
- [Quick Start](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/learn/react/quick-start.md): Let's begin by importing <ApiLink href='../../api/react/useStateValue'>useStateValue</ApiLink> from `'cotton-box-react'`.
- [Selectors](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/learn/react/selectors.md): Sometimes, our state might be an object and we only need to the value of certain properties from that object, but when any property is changed, the...
- [Setup](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/learn/react/setup.md): :::info
- [Disposal](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/learn/tutorial/disposal.md): To dispose a State Manager, we use the `.dispose` method. This is important when the State Manager is not created/used globally.

- [Waiting For State Change](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/learn/tutorial/waiting-for-state-change.md): Waiting is an observation strategy that utilizes `.watch` under the hood. It allows us to watch for state value changes until it matches a certain ...
- [Watching For State Changes](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/learn/tutorial/watching-for-state-changes.md): We can observe state changes with the `.watch` method.
- [Which State Manager Should I Use?](https://glyph-cat.github.io/cotton-box/docs/learn/tutorial/which-state-manager-should-i-use.md): The package comes with three types of State Managers, each with slightly different characteristics, tailored for different use cases.
